title: The Egghead Siege Begins
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Franky, Unknown person #12, Sentomaru, Lucci as The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
scene: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Well, you'll just need to ignore him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't ignore a man who's determined to fight for his duty...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Doing that will go against my ideals...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Furthermore, if we start our assault now, Sentomaru will surely...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Order the Mecha Sea Beast weapons and the 50 pacifistas under his command to sink our fleet.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hmmm... the situation's getting more and more complicated....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What about the power plant? Do we know it's location?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Rob Lucci is quite the shrewd and cunning fellow...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He already sent all the info we need...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tell the Rokushiki* users to be on standby, our assault will begin soon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Free all CPO agents from those Pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tonall Bombardment units, remember that bomb blast attacks don't work on the Pacifistas!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Aim for the Mecha Sea Beast Weapons!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dahahahaha! I get what you mean, but don't forget our goal here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I love these sky island grounds!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Siege Begins through 33 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
